cooperates.cooperate_desc: can hold enemies in place, allowing Harley to land his first skill (Poker Trick) and ultimate (Deadly Magic) reliably.

counters.counter_desc: Arguably the best counter due to his passive and skills that interrupt mobility. When Khufra uses his second skill (Bouncing Ball), Harley cannot use his second skill (Space Escape) dash to initiate or escape, rendering his mobility useless.
A top counter for quick deletion. A well-timed Ultimate (Triple Sweep) can kill Harley before he can react or escape, provided Saber plays from the bush.
Kaja's Ultimate (Divine Judgment) is a direct counter to Harley's fast-paced gameplay. The suppression prevents Harley from returning to his hat, allowing Kaja's team to instantly destroy him.
Her shield (Guardian's Bulwark) can block Harley's first-skill poker cards and his Ultimate, mitigating his entire burst damage combo.

dominants.dominant_desc:
1. High-Speed Farming & Jungle Routing
Optimal Clear: Utilize Harley's high base damage to clear the jungle rapidly. Focus on securing early kills to snowball.
Fastest Clear Method: A reported 2-minute-48-second clear involves starting at blue, utilizing max-range Poker Trick (Q) to pull camps, and using the second skill to maneuver through walls to Red.
Spell Choice: Taking Ice Retribution is crucial for slowing targets and improving your ability to stick to enemies for full magic damage penetration. 

2. Combat Tactics & Combo Mechanics
The "Jump-In/Jump-Out" Method: Use Skill 2 (Shadow Escape) to jump in, cast the full combo, and immediately jump back to safety.
Basic Attack Passive (Magic Master): Always weave basic attacks between skills. The passive reduces enemy magic defense and increases your attack speed, making your cards hit much harder.
Primary Combo: Skill 2 (engage) -> Ultimate (Deadly Magic) -> Skill 1 (Poker Trick) -> Basic Attack -> Skill 2 (escape).

3. Build & Emblem Trends (2026)
Core Items: Focus on items that provide Magic Power and Magic Penetration to ensure a "one-shot" potential on squishy targets.
High Damage Build: Core items often include Genius Wand, Starlium Scythe, and Divine Glaive to maximize damage against both high- and low-defense heroes.
Emblem Settings: Utilize the Mage or Assassin emblem with points in rupture (penetration) and lethal ignition (burn damage) for faster early game kills. 

4. Macro Strategy & Tips
Early/Mid Game Domination: Harley thrives in the early game. Focus on securing turtles and picking off squishy mages/marksmen to prevent them from scaling.
Counter-Initiation: Use your mobility to turn unfavorable team fights around by immediately taking out the enemy's damage dealers (squishy heroes).
Maintain Aggression: As a high-burst assassin, staying aggressive after securing a gold lead is key, as Harley can struggle if the game drags into the ultra-late game

emblems.emblem_desc:
-Use Trill to gain adaptive attack

-Use Seasoned Hunter in your custom mage emblem set. This allows Harley to farm significantly faster, enabling quick level 4 at around 1:20-1:30 minutes.

-Impure Rage
Dealing damage with skills deals 4% of target's Max HP extra Adaptive Damage and restores 2% Mana on hit. (If the hero does not use Mana, restores 1% HP instead. The extra Adaptive Damage dealt to non-hero units is up to 120. Cooldown: 5 seconds

equips.equip_desc:
Magic Boots: After dealing damage to a creep, deal 25(+3*Hero Level) + (+1%Total HP) True Damage to the target over 3s (damage is increased by 100% for non-marksmen).

Genius Wand: Dealing damage to enemy heroes will reduce their Magic Defense by 3+(0.3*Hero Level) for 2 seconds. Stacks up to 3 times.

Lightning Truncheon: Every 6 seconds, the next skill that deals damage will resonate, dealing (120% Magic Power) extra Magic Damage to up to 3 enemies and speeding up the hero by 30%, which decays over 2 seconds.

Concentrated Energy: Increases Magic Power by 5 after dealing Magic Damage (this effect stacks up to 6 times and can only gain 1 stack every 0.4s). When reaching full stacks, increases Magic Damage by 12% for 3s.

Holy Crystal: Gains 21%-35% extra Magic Power(Scales with level).

Divine Glaive: When attacking an enemy, gains 0.1% extra Magic Penetration for each point of the enemy's Magic Defense, capped at 20%.

hero.hero_overview: Harley is a high-tier, dominant burst jungler in the April 2026 MLBB meta, favored for his exceptional speed in clearing camps, invading enemy jungles, and instantly deleting squishy heroes.
hero.hero_strength:
High Burst Damage & Snowballing: Harley's primary strength is his capacity to eliminate squishy heroes rapidly, allowing him to secure early game advantages and snowball into mid-game domination.
Enhanced Mobility: Following a late 2025 buff, his Skill 2 cooldown was significantly reduced (8-6 seconds), allowing for more frequent dashes and safer harassment, with enhanced movement speed upon returning to his hat.
Improved Ultimate Reliability: His ultimate projectile can no longer be blocked by enemy heroes, and its faster animation makes it harder to dodge, ensuring more consistent damage output in team fights.
Item Synergy: Harley excels with items that boost his magic penetration and damage speed, such as Genius Wand, making him a consistent threat against heroes lacking defensive items.
hero.hero_weakness:
Tanky/Sustain Lineups: Harley struggles to burst down high-HP or tanky heroes, making team compositions with tanks like Baxia or high sustain heroes difficult for him to handle.
Crowd Control (CC) and Suppression: Heroes that can stop his "Space Escape" (Skill 2) in its tracks are his hardest counters. Kaja (suppress) and Jawhead (displacement) are top counters.
Burst and Instant Deletion: Assassins or Mages that can instantly burst him down before he can teleport back to his hat are effective. Examples include Saber, Eudora, Hayabusa, and Vale.
Positioning Mistakes: While mobile, if Harley uses his 2nd skill aggressively, he becomes fragile. If his return point is found, he can be ambushed easily.
Counter-Items: He is vulnerable to defensive items like Radiant Armor (to reduce his magic DPS) and Winter Crown (to survive his ultimate burst combo).

spell.spell_desc: Ice Retribution is preferred in the meta because it steals movement speed, allowing Harley to chase or escape, which is vital since he is quite squishy.

hero.hero_overview: Harley in Mobile Legends is a high-mobility assassin . He's known for his burst damage, kiting ability, and crowd control. Great for ambushing and taking down enemies quickly, but requires good positioning and timing.
hero.hero_strength:
- Great kiting and mobility, making him hard to catch
- Huge burst damage with his skills and passive
- Decent crowd control with his ultimate
- Great ganker and roamer, excelling at ambushing enemies
- Good clearing speed and short cooldowns
- Excellent mobility with his Space Escape skill, allowing him to reposition quickly
- High burst damage in the early game, making him a threat to squishy heroes
- Ability to lock down opponents with his ultimate, making him a great assassin
hero.hero_weakness: Crowd Control (CC): Heroes like Eudora, Saber, Khufra, and Kaja can lock him down instantly, stopping his escape.Defensive Items: Athena's Shield is crucial for squishy heroes to survive his ultimate, while Radiant Armor counters his card damage.Damage Immunity: Heroes with invulnerability skills, such as Lancelot, Ling, or Hayabusa, can avoid his ultimate's explosion.

spell.spell_desc: Retribution is a spell in Mobile Legends that deals true damage to enemies and restores HP when used on minions. When used on enemy heroes, it reveals their location and deals damage to them. It's commonly used by jungle roles to clear minions and harass enemies.

emblems.emblem_desc: The hybrid assembly on Harley combines elements of a magician and a murderer (assassin)

equips.equip_desc:
1. The essence of the assembly

The hybrid assembly on Harley combines elements of a magician and a murderer (assassin), focusing on:

High magic damage;

Attack speed and mobility;

Penetration of magic (penetration);

Moderate survival rate.

This assembly allows Harley to effectively "blow up" both squashes (fragile heroes) and tanks, quickly inflict damage and get away from danger.

2. Items (assembly of equipment)

The image shows items characteristic of hybrid style:

Magic boots (Arcane Boots / Ice Hunter's Arcane Boots) - reduce the recharge of skills, give magical power.

Genius Wand - increases magical power and penetration, critically important for damage.

Holy Crystal - gives a lot of magical power, enhances basic attacks and skills.

Starlium Scythe / Divine Glaive - add damage and penetration, reduce enemy protection.

Lightning Truncheon / Blood Wings - the choice depends on the situation:

Lightning Truncheon - for additional magic damage and control.

Blood Wings - to increase magical power and regenerate mana.

Winter Crown or Glowing Wand - increase damage and add effects (freezing / burn).

3. Emblems (Emblem)

The best choice is Assassin Emblems, as they give:

Adaptive penetration (+16);

Adaptive attack (+10);

Increase in movement speed (+3%).

The alternative is the Mage Emblems for greater magical penetration and power if there are few magicians in the team.

hero.hero_weakness:
Tips

Positioning: stay behind the team, use the bushes for sudden attacks.

Mana management: monitor the mana reserve, use items with regeneration (Holy Crystal, Blood Wings).

Synergy with the team: goes well with the characters who provide control (e.g. Odette, Johnson).

Counterpeaks: avoid direct collision with tanks without objects to penetrate.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: The collaboration between the heroes Farza and Harley is effective and practical, as Farza's ultimate skill greatly helps Harley in quickly defeating enemy heroes. Together, they can eliminate multiple enemy heroes in a short amount of time.

counters.counter_desc: The hero Tigreal doesn't synergize well with Harley, as his second skill pushes enemies away from Harley, especially if Harley has already used his ultimate ability.

dominants.dominant_desc:
1. Quick Attack:

Use this advantage to target individual enemies in small skirmishes. Try to seize opportunities when enemies are isolated or weak. Use the "Magic Shock" skill to deal damage quickly.

2. Movement and Evasion:

When in a defensive position, try to stay at a distance from enemies and use "Space Escape" to quickly retreat. Stay in areas where you can move freely during skirmishes.

emblems.emblem_desc: Choosing three emblems grants the hero a 20% increase in speed and instantly restores 15% of lost health, along with a boost in damage and high magic penetration.

equips.equip_desc: High-efficiency equipment at the start of the match. It grants the hero movement speed, increases magic damage, restores health after each victory, and also slows down enemy heroes' movement.

hero.hero_overview:
Harley is a talented young magician known for his speed and playful spirit. 
He set out on adventures to test his abilities,with his signature hat and magic cards, he brings energy and charm to the battlefield. 
His agility makes him a favorite for fast-paced gameplay.
hero.hero_strength: Harley is a magic with high burst damage and great mobility. His skills allow him to quickly deal magic damage and dodge attacks.  His ultimate, "Deadly Magic" targets enemies for advancing damage, making him a strong and agile hero in fast- paced gameplay
hero.hero_weakness:
1. Farming and Protection: Harley lacks strong protection, making him vulnerable to attacks in the early game.

2. Team Fights: In team fights, Harley can be vulnerable if his position is identified quickly.

3. Early and Late Game: In the early game, he's weak and needs time to develop his abilities. He also becomes less effective in the late game against stronger heroes.

4. Hero Traits: His low durability prevents him from staying in the frontline for long periods.

hero.hero_overview: Harley merupakan hero Mage/Assassin di Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, yang terkenal dengan burst damage-nya yang tinggi dan mobilitas yang luar biasa. Untuk saat ini di rank tinggi lebih sering digunakan sebagai hero jungler
hero.hero_strength:
Burst damage tinggi.
Mobilitas luar biasa dengan skill blink.
Bisa mengincar hero squishy (mudah mati) dengan cepat.
hero.hero_weakness:
Sangat bergantung pada item.
Rapuh jika terkena crowd control.
Membutuhkan akurasi tinggi dalam menggunakan skill.

spell.spell_desc: Merupakan battle spell wajib untuk jungler. utamanya adalah untuk farming,contest, dan dapat memberikan efek debuff kepada musuh. Untuk efek debuff dari retri sendiri ada 3 macam.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Кайя хороший роум с идеальным ультимейтом под взрывной урон для Харли

counters.counter_desc: Флорин прямой контр пик Харли так как своим ультимейтом полностью спасает союзников и лечит их что не даёт Харли шансов

dominants.dominant_desc: После 4 уровня Харли желательно выйти на голд линию и убить вражеского адк

emblems.emblem_desc: Харли очень важно иметь магическое проникновение которое сочитается с его ультимейтом плюс эмблемы мага так как у него магический урон.

equips.equip_desc: Сборка рассчитана на большое магическое проникновение и взрывной магический урон

hero.hero_overview: Харли очень сильный маг и убийца в лесу с хорошим взрывным уроном эскейпом и мобильностью.Хорошо подходит для начальных рангов.
hero.hero_strength: Быстро фармит лес за счёт высокой мобильности, хороший урон в начале игры и позднем лейте.
hero.hero_weakness: Полагаю единственной слабостью Харли является то что он герой прокаста и ему сложно драться с несколькими соперникам сразу.

data.recommend: Рекомендовано тем кто хочет научиться играть на весёлом и лёгком маге убийце.

spell.spell_desc: Харли убийца и это его главная роль поэтому следует брать возмездие.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: These two hero work well because if harley didnt put enough damage while the enemy is on the ultimate novaria can throw a ball to add additional damage to the enemy so it can be executed

counters.counter_desc: Harley can easily counter miya because harley is an assassin that pop ups quick wihout even noticing he is a high burst mage assassin

dominants.dominant_desc: Avoid teamfights in early game if you are lvl 4 you can hunt the enemy's marksman first

emblems.emblem_desc: Lethal ignition for additional burst damage,seasoned hunter for faster farming,rupture for additional penetration

equips.equip_desc: This build is great for hunting enemy it comes with glowing wand that helps to kill the enemy even theyre healing or regening

hero.hero_overview: Harley Is great in early game because he has a high mobility making it for him to escape easier
hero.hero_strength: Harley have a huge advantage because he has a high mobility assassin which can assasinate an enemy very quick
hero.hero_weakness: Harley is great but there are some disadvantage he can be hunted easily by single burst assasina like eudora,saber, etc.

spell.spell_desc: Retribution is for taking buffs and usingg also in enemy

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Novaria can use her skills to check bush for gank purposes, or for slowing enemies down for harley to catch up to them.

counters.counter_desc: Lolita is a great choice for countering harley, for the reason she can deflect projectiles and harleys' skills are mostly projectile.

dominants.dominant_desc: Focus on jungling and farming, always visit on gold lane and help takedown enemy marksman this would impact greatly on the end game.

emblems.emblem_desc: Rupture for extra penetration, seasoned hunter for fast turtle and lord takedown, and lethal ignition for additional damage dealt after casting ultimate to the enemy.

equips.equip_desc: High penetration build for bursting enemies, genius wand for magic def reduction, glowing wand for scorch effect and life bane, lightning truncheon for extra damage, and divine glaive for high penetration, and lastly holy crystal with massive magic damage.

data.recommend: Harley bust/DPS, ensures win, but depends on teammates.
data.title: Harley jungle

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Having Lesley by your side gives enough advantage to boost your base HP

counters.counter_desc: Having healer in enemy side would be a great distraction as the enemy won't die merely for your ultimate

dominants.dominant_desc: Strong enough to halfen enemy's HP with skill 1. Be dominant in early fights
Rotate with proper map awareness, watch if there's a need in help. You will be a very good assistor, or slainer
With full build, what's matter is whether your enemies is bulky or squishy. Hit-and-run for countering high HP (Buy Wishing Lantern) or charge on for squishy heroes

emblems.emblem_desc: Great for 1-player pickoff as this increases your penetration and adaptive damage

equips.equip_desc: Helps in building magic damage, defensive style as Harley is squishy hero

hero.hero_overview: Assassin and mage, usually played as jungle. Mid Lane is also efficient
hero.hero_strength: Has a strong escaping ability and greatly damage enemies
hero.hero_weakness: Not tanky for sure, also Harley lacks of CC

dominants.dominant_desc: Harley can utilize his true damage for team fight avoid getting gunk by diving into 1 or more enemy heroes without other team. Check the map and initiate signals to your teammates for best game and fun experience.
dominants.dominant_title: Prioritize 1 skill for fast jungle and 2 skill for faster rotation to the map and 3 skill ultimate for early burst damage kill to dominate the game.

equips.equip_desc: Aggressive Burst Damaged.

hero.hero_overview: Harley, the Mage Genius, is a flashy assassin-mage hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang. Using his unique skill set, he can easily blink close to his target.
hero.hero_strength:
Dealing magic damage with his wand
Throws cards
Teleports
Summons Magic Fire Ring.
hero.hero_weakness: To counter Harley, you should use mobile heroes who can easily avoid Harley's skills. Use magic defense items and anti-burst damage items.

data.recommend: Best Emblem and Build for Harley.

spell.spell_desc:
Deal 520 (+80 Hero Level) True Damage to the target Creep or minion.
Passive; Increase Creep rewards by 60% and reduces damage taken from basic creeps by 40%. Also grants 15% additional Damage reduction in the allied jungle during the first 2min. Cannot share minion rewards with allied.
